currentNonce().details: Returns the current nonce (next nonce to be assigned). Maps to InterlinkGateway.currentNonce.

estimateFee(uint64,bytes).details: Estimate the fee required to send a message to the destination chain.

executedNonces(uint64).details: Returns whether a specific nonce has been executed. Maps to InterlinkGateway.executedNonces.

sendMessage(uint64,bytes32,bytes,address.details: Send a cross-chain message to a destination chain.

params.feeAmount: amount of fee tokens to pay
params.feeToken: token used to pay the relayer fee (address(0) for native)
params.payload: arbitrary payload data to be executed on destination
params.recipient: recipient address on the destination chain (32 bytes)

returns.nonce: the sequence number assigned to this message
